howItWorks.title: How It Works
steps: Enter complete birth information (year, month, day, time)
System calculates both Purple Star and BaZi charts simultaneously
AI analyzes differences and consensus between the two systems
Provides comprehensive confidence assessment and recommendations

hero.description: Blending traditional astrological wisdom with modern AI, I reveal your life's blueprint and guide you through every important choice.

journey.title: Begin Your Exploration with Ease
journey.subtitle: Three steps to personalized life guidance

step1.title: Enter Your Data Mindfully
step1.desc: Provide your birth date and time—this is the first step to establish our connection.

step2.title: AI Deep Decoding
step2.desc: Peixuan transforms complex chart data into essential life advice just for you.

step3.title: Receive Life Guidance
step3.desc: Engage in deep conversation with Peixuan to resolve current confusion and see future clarity.

new.subtitle: Ready to Meet a Better You?

returning.subtitle: Welcome Back, Explorer

cta.footer: Anonymous • No Personal Data • Professional Astrology AI

features.title: Platform Advantages
features.accurate_desc: Dual validation of BaZi and Purple Star for more reliable results
features.readable_desc: I translate complex charts into life advice you can understand, like a heartfelt conversation between friends.
features.accessible_desc: Anonymous usage, no registration required. Chart data is stored with anonymous ID, contains no name or contact info, auto-deleted after 6 months.
